channel.title: Reading on Deutsch Prep — SDS Exam
channel.description: Recent content in Reading on Deutsch Prep — SDS Exam

item.title: Reading Practice Exercises
item.description:
Work through these exercises to build SDS reading skills. Check your answers at the bottom of each section.

Exercise 1: Job Ad — True/False (A2)

Read the job ad, then mark each statement ja or nein.

Stellenanzeige

Verkäufer/in (60%) — Bäckerei Müller, Bern

Wir suchen ab 1. April eine/n freundliche/n Verkäufer/in für unsere Bäckerei in der Altstadt.

Anforderungen:

  • Erfahrung im Verkauf (mindestens 1 Jahr)
  • Gute Deutschkenntnisse (B1)
  • Freundlich und teamfähig

Wir bieten:

item.title: Reading Strategies for SDS
item.description:
Core Principle: Scan, Don’t Read

The SDS reading section rewards finding specific information quickly, not understanding every word. Train your eyes to scan for keywords.

Strategy 1: Read Questions First

Before reading any text:

  1. Read ALL questions or statements
  2. Underline/note the keywords in each question
  3. Then scan the text for those keywords

This turns reading into a search task rather than a comprehension task.

Strategy 2: Keyword Matching

For true/false and MC tasks:
